programme.title: 2026 PGA Championship
programme.desc: The PGA Championship continues with the third round at Aronimink Golf Club in Pennsylvania. The major tournament returns to the 7,394-yard, par-70 layout for the first time since 1962 as the remaining field competes for a $19 million purse.

programme.title: MLS Soccer
programme.desc: Toronto FC (3-4-5) travels to Bank of America Stadium to face Charlotte FC (4-6-3). Both clubs enter Matchday 14 separated by just one point in the Eastern Conference. Neither side is in peak form, making this a crucial game for playoff contention.

programme.title: MLS Soccer
programme.desc: Real Salt Lake hosts Rocky Mountain Cup rival Colorado Rapids at America First Field. Real Salt Lake (22 pts) enters this match after scoring 20 goals through 11 games while the Rapids lean on leading scorer Rafael Navarro looking to carry momentum.
